name: Denied comp after forklift hit in North Salt Lake, appeal time?

mainEntity.name: Denied comp after forklift hit in North Salt Lake, appeal time?

acceptedAnswer.description: **File Application for Hearing promptly; request Claims Resolution first.** Utah has processes for denials.[1] Key factors: 21-45 day insurer decision. Gather evidence. Deadlines strict. Attorney boosts success.
